subcodes.first_line: All praise belongeth unto the pure and sanctified Lord, Who, self-subsisting and everlasting, hath been the Source from which every transient thing hath come into being [3.5s]... ...Say, O high priests!  Ye are held in reverence because of My Name, and yet ye flee Me!  Ye are the high priests of the Temple
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش پاک یزدانرا سزاست که بخودی خود زنده و پاینده بوده هر نابودی از بود او پدیدار
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of the Manifestation of God
